ddls:
CREATE TABLE "emails" (
  "email_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the email */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient of the email */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the email */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the email message */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date and time the email was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the email (e.g., sent, delivered, read, failed) */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email template used, if applicable */,
  "archived" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the email is archived */,
  "draft" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the email is a draft */,
  "scheduled_send_date" TEXT /* Date and time the email is scheduled to be sent */,
  "bounce_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the email bounced */,
  "complaint_count" INTEGER /* Number of complaints received for the email */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("email_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emails_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES email_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emails_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES email_templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emails_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emails_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's department */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user's account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the department was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the department was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the email template */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Default subject for the template */,
  "message" TEXT /* Default message content for the template */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the template */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the template was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the template */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the template was last modified */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the template is active */,
  "template_type" TEXT /* Type of the template (e.g., welcome, promotional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_templates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_templates_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the email status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the email status */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the status was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "email_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email being tracked */,
  "open_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the email was opened */,
  "click_count" INTEGER /* Number of times links in the email were clicked */,
  "last_opened" TEXT /* Date and time the email was last opened */,
  "last_clicked" TEXT /* Date and time the email was last clicked */,
  "unsubscribe_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the unsubscribe link was clicked */,
  "spam_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the email was marked as spam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_engagement_email_id FOREIGN KEY ("email_id") REFERENCES emails ("email_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient record */,
  "email_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email being tracked */,
  "recipient_email" TEXT /* Email address of the recipient */,
  "recipient_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date and time the email was sent to the recipient */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email status */,
  "bounce_date" TEXT /* Date and time the email bounced */,
  "complaint_date" TEXT /* Date and time the recipient marked the email as spam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_recipients_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES email_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_recipients_email_id FOREIGN KEY ("email_id") REFERENCES emails ("email_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_audit_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "email_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email being tracked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., sent, opened, clicked) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_audit_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_audit_log_email_id FOREIGN KEY ("email_id") REFERENCES emails ("email_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "pref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the preference was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_filters" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email filter */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "filter_name" TEXT /* Name of the filter */,
  "filter_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for the filter */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the filter is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the filter was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the filter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_filters_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email version */,
  "email_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email being tracked */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the email */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time the email version was created */,
  "version_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the email version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made to the email in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_versioning_version_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_versioning_email_id FOREIGN KEY ("email_id") REFERENCES emails ("email_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_tracking" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email tracking record */,
  "email_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email being tracked */,
  "tracking_date" TEXT /* Date and time the email was tracked */,
  "tracking_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who tracked the email */,
  "tracking_action" TEXT /* Action performed on the email (e.g., opened, clicked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_tracking_tracking_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("tracking_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_tracking_email_id FOREIGN KEY ("email_id") REFERENCES emails ("email_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_collaboration" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email collaboration record */,
  "email_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email being collaborated on */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date and time the collaboration occurred */,
  "collaboration_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who collaborated on the email */,
  "collaboration_action" TEXT /* Action performed on the email (e.g., edited, commented) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_collaboration_collaboration_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaboration_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_collaboration_email_id FOREIGN KEY ("email_id") REFERENCES emails ("email_id")
)
